name: Giant Centipede
description: Roll 2 dice, add their results and suffer a number of wounds equal to this total.

name: Spider's Venom
description: You are bitten by a spider. While you are in the catacombs, roll 1 die at the start of your status phase: 1-2) Suffer 1 wound. 3-6) Nothing happens.

name: Shuffle
description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the search deck and the search discard pile together. Finally draw a card from the search deck and resolve it.

name: Ferrox
description: Roll 1 die; the result is the ferrox's life value. Then, test strength. If you succeed, the ferrox loses 1 life. If you fail, suffer 1 wound. Continue testing strength until the ferrox's life value reaches 0 or until you die.

name: Unstable Potion
description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

name: Secret Door
description: You may immediately move to any adjacent space. If the space is unexplored, place a chamber as normal. If you encounter a monster, you cannot escape.

name: Passage Down
description: Place a catacomb entrance marker on this chamber.

name: Empty
description: The room is empty; nothing happens.
